candidate_problems.text: What kind of new representation could make wrong explanations of RH easy to refute—spectral, dynamical, geometric, or something not yet formalized?
Which existing equivalent formulations of RH preserve the same error modes, and what does that reveal about the invariant source of difficulty?
Are there historical examples of major mathematical problems that remained hard across many reformulations until a new ontology or object class was introduced, and is RH structurally similar?
